title: Connected Vanilla Textures
description: This pack connects a lot of the default vanilla textures without changing anything else.
body:
Connected Vanilla Textures

A resource pack that contains connected vanilla textures for some blocks.

### Connected Blocks - Glass, glass pane, stained glass (all colours), stained glass pane (all colours), tinted glass - Sea lanterns, shroomlights, froglights - Bookshelves - Blocks of ores (copper, diamond, emerald, gold, iron, lapis lazuli, netherite and redstone) - Ores (copper, diamond, emerald, gold, iron, lapis lazuli, netherite and redstone) #### Dependency - [Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity) mod or optifine. --- ***Do join the linked discord to submit issues, request mod additions or give any sort of feedback regarding the project, I would love to hear from you.*** --- ### Pack Availability This list contains all game versions that Connected Vanilla Textures resource pack is compatible with: | Game Versions |Resource Pack Formats| Connected Vanilla Textures Availability| |:------------------------|:-------------------:|:----------------:| | 1.6.1 - 1.14.4 | - | No | | 1.15 – 1.16.1 | 5 |Yes| | 1.16.2 – 1.16.5 | 6 |Yes| | 1.17 – 1.17.1 | 7 |Yes| | 1.18 – 1.18.2 | 8 |Yes| | 1.19 – 1.19.2 | 9 |Yes| | 1.19.3 | 12 |Yes| | 1.19.4 | 13 |Yes| | 1.20 – 1.20.1 | 15 |Yes| | 1.20.2 | 18 |Yes| | 1.20.3 - 1.20.4 | 22 |In progress| | 1.20.5 - 1.20.6 | 32 |Yet to update| | 1.21 | 34 |Yet to update| ### Credits - [Midnighttigger's Default Connected Textures](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/mt-ct-d) for the glass and pane textures used
